body_transformation: The tail tip transforms into a jagged, electrified plasma core with crackling blue-yellow energy arcs, its original flame shape refined into sharp, branching lightning patterns. The pale cream underbelly now features a smooth, conductive silver-blue skin texture with subtle glowing circuit patterns tracing its contours. The rounded head sharpens slightly with angular cheek ridges and a faintly luminous yellow aura around the eyes. The stubby legs gain sleek, metallic sheen with electric blue streaks along their length, while the ear tips develop a subtle sparking texture.
signature_feature: Tail tip: jagged plasma core with crackling blue-yellow energy arcs and neon green circuit patterns.
